flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Philadelphia College of Osteopathic Medicine rose 75% between 2013 and 2016 ($3.0k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Philadelphia College of Osteopathic Medicine fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
